message:
fix: classify OpenAI invalid_prompt as ContentFilterError

The error code "invalid_prompt" and message "usage policy" from OpenAI's
content policy rejection were falling through to InvalidRequestError.
Add error code checking (invalid_prompt, content_policy_violation) and
"usage policy" message pattern to classifyByMessage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
